pi_items.source: ISO 639-1 standard and Jitsi Meet's languages.json (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jitsi/jitsi-meet/master/lang/languages.json)
ISO 639-1 standard references and language naming conventions (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_639_language_codes)
Docker compose configuration at examples/jitsi_meet_env/config/docker-compose.yml (line 7: ports '8080:80', line 25: PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:8080)
Export script at examples/jitsi_meet_env/tasks/change_interface_language/export_result.sh (line 39) and Jitsi Meet documentation showing this key stores user settings including language

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Jitsi Meet web conferencing software running locally on http://localhost:8080. The target language is French with ISO 639-1 code 'fr'. User language preferences are stored in Firefox's localStorage under the key 'features/base/settings' as a JSON object. All metadata values are accurate and verified against official Jitsi Meet code and ISO language standards.
